brief: Bonfyre runs as a layered pipeline: browser intake launches a GitHub-native workflow, Actions execute small C11 binaries, and Pages renders the final artifact views. The repo is organized around composable operators instead of one monolith, so teams can adopt intake, briefing, embedding, and publishing separately.
whyItMatters: One walkthrough becomes searchable product knowledge.

brief: A second reference record extends the same workflow so in-app search and reuse are visible instead of theoretical.
